name: mk-qa-master
summary: MCP server for running tests across pytest / Jest / Cypress / Go test / Maestro / Schemathesis / Newman (web + mobile + native API via OpenAPI + Postman collections), with self-improvement analytics, a bilingual (EN / zh-TW) built-in QA knowledge layer, and an AI Visual Challenge Solver for reCAPTCHA v2 + hCaptcha image-grid challenges (AI 測試大師)
